title: stylidium obtusatum var. rubricalyx
intro: Stylidium obtusatum var. rubricalyx is a variety of the Stylidium obtusatum species, commonly known as the trigger plant, which belongs to the Stylidiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stylidium obtusatum var. rubricalyx include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a topical ointment or cream to apply directly to affected areas.
